200.description: Campaign status returned for all submitted IDs
Messaging disabled on all submitted numbers

numbers_enabled.description: Numbers successfully disabled, keyed by TN

409.description: Partial failure — one or more numbers not found on account or already disabled

post.description: Disable SMS and MMS for numbers

200.description: Messaging enabled on all submitted numbers

409.description: Partial failure — one or more numbers could not be enabled

post.description: Enable SMS and MMS for numbers. An approved 10DLC campaignID will soon be required for enablement.

400.description: Bad request response from mdr mms.
Bad request response from mdr sms.
Message rejected — messaging network returned success=false. success and result.referenceId are stripped; result.transactionGUID is added.

401.description: Unauthorized — source number not on account (POST /v2.1/messaging/mms/).

405.description: MMS not enabled on account or number

406.description: STOP Blocked — destination has opted out (POST /v2.1/messaging/mms/).

409.description: Partial failure — one or more numbers could not be updated (POST /v2.1/messaging/routein/).
Partial failure — one or more numbers could not be updated (POST /v2.1/messaging/routeout/).

401.description: Unauthorized — source number not on account (POST /v2.1/messaging/sms/).

405.description: SMS not enabled on account or number

406.description: STOP Blocked — destination has opted out (POST /v2.1/messaging/sms/).

409.description: One or more numbers not found on account

post.description: Get SMS and MMS status for numbers

campaignID.example: A 10DLC campaignID to be associated with a registered ten-digit number. eg: CONVOLUTED
An approved 10DLC campaignID assigned by TCR. eg: CORROSIVE

apikey.description: 32-character hexadecimal API key. Pass as Bearer token.
